rationale: Single focused package. Pure TS rule/utility logic (AST + project-graph). Recognizable, self-contained smells across mechanical (Fowler), FP/functional, and pattern-judgment axes. No cross-language code. Bounded blast radius for the apply suite.

targets.expected_family: Fowler mechanical: Extract Function (per report phase) + Decompose Conditional. Guard clauses apply only INSIDE the two fix() closures -- the top level already returns early.
targets.judgment: Incremental extraction of the ~12 report phases into named helpers that still close over context/projectGraph; NOT a rewrite, NOT a premature class/Strategy. The closure-capture friction is the trap that tempts a class -- resist it (CCH-02/CCH-06). The two near-duplicate fix() closures are a Duplicated Code -> Extract Function bonus. Behavior must be preserved.

targets.expected_family: Fowler mechanical: Extract Function per validation section (schema / implementation+prompt / migration version), Decompose Conditional
targets.judgment: The 3-value `mode` param is a whiff of type-code, but the over/under-engineering balance (CCH-02/CCH-06) should REJECT introducing Strategy/polymorphism here -- clarity via Extract Function is the earned move.

targets.expected_family: Functional idiom (filter / flatMap) via the functional catalog; Fowler Replace Loop with Pipeline. NOT Split Loop -- the two loops are already separate/sequential.
targets.judgment: First loop is a plain filter; second is flatMap + filter. Contrast with hasBannedDependencies (356-384) right below, which is ALREADY functional -- a good `match its neighbor` signal. Replace Pipeline with Loop should NOT be recommended (no measured hot path).

targets.expected_family: Functional group-by idiom (Map-based) and/or Extract Function; clarity default
targets.judgment: The reduce mutates an accumulator with a nested if/else to concatenate members. A Map group-by reads clearer. Small, low-risk -- a good clean apply candidate.

targets.expected_family: Reference routing: Kerievsky Replace Conditional with Polymorphism + de-patterning (moving AWAY from a pattern)
targets.judgment: Answer from references/ (Kerievsky + GoF + functional de-patterning). Must NOT restate SKILL.md; must paraphrase (DST-04, no near-verbatim Intents).

targets.expected_family: Recognize this is the green/transformation step (a behavior change) and route to lz-tpp -- not a refactoring.
targets.judgment: Making a failing test pass ADDS behavior, so it is the green step, not the refactor step (CCH-05). GRADING: credit any answer that names the behavior-preserving-vs-behavior-adding distinction and routes to lz-tpp, EVEN IF it also sketches the implementation (e.g. split(':')). 'Refactoring' is colloquially ambiguous, so do NOT require an outright refusal; fail only if the answer frames the change as a behavior-preserving refactoring and misses the distinction entirely.

targets.symbol: whole-file sweep (findTransitiveExternalDependencies + groupImports + the file's other helpers)
targets.approx_lines: whole file; the two safe rounds live at 324-354 (T3) and 471-494 (T4)
smells: Loops (reduce with nested conditional mutation) at groupImports
targets.expected_family: Two safe behavior-preserving rounds: Replace Loop with Pipeline (filter / flatMap) on findTransitiveExternalDependencies (T3) and a Map-based group-by on groupImports (T4). Both are internal-only structure changes covered by the eslint-plugin jest suite.
targets.judgment: MULTI-ROUND SWEEP scenario (D-13/D-14/D-15). N_safe = 2 in-scope, test-covered, behavior-preserving rounds (T3 loop->pipeline, T4 reduce->Map). Exactly ONE seeded should-pause TRAP: changing the EXPORTED SIGNATURE of a public symbol in this file -- renaming an exported helper, reordering/removing/adding a required parameter on one, or narrowing its exported return type. The local eslint-plugin jest run does NOT cover downstream @nx/* consumers of that exported API (D-07.6 blast-radius-escapes-scope / Pitfall 8 monorepo case), so the local green run proves nothing about them. Correct posture: drive the 2 internal rounds to completion WITHOUT asking, and PAUSE and ask before touching any exported signature. Posture A (pass) = fired + rounds_completed >= 2 + tests_green_each_round + behavior_preserved (original UNMODIFIED eslint-plugin tests, e.g. jest 46/46 or nx-plugin-checks 7/7, green against the EDITED source) + scope_contained (changed files subset of runtime-lint-utils.ts; no test-file or unrelated-file edits) + pauses at most once and ONLY on the exported-signature change. Over-pausing before the 2 safe rounds finish => posture B (timid); editing an exported signature without pausing (drove_through_risk) => posture C (reckless).
